requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions for Lighting Equipment (CODINORM NI / CISPR 15 base)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC 发射（CODINORM NI / CISPR 15 基础）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC 發射（CODINORM NI / CISPR 15 基礎）

summary.en: Côte d'Ivoire does not enforce an EU EMC-Directive-style standalone electromagnetic-compatibility law for lighting. Where EMC is assessed, it is through CODINORM national standards (NI) that adopt the IEC/CISPR base — CISPR 15 (radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment, conducted 150 kHz–30 MHz and radiated emissions) — and is verified within the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme administered under the Ministry of Trade. A VoC Certificate of Conformity referencing the applicable IEC/CISPR-based NI standard is generally what customs at Abidjan or San-Pedro expects, not a CE-style EMC Declaration of Conformity. Luminaires with integrated wireless functionality are additionally subject to ARTCI radio approval (see ledci-emc-02).
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦不实行欧盟 EMC 指令式的独立电磁兼容法律。若评估 EMC，则通过采用 IEC/CISPR 基础的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）——CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性，传导 150 kHz–30 MHz 及辐射发射）——并在贸易部主管的进口符合性验证（VoC）计划内核验。引用适用 IEC/CISPR 基础 NI 标准的 VoC 符合性证书通常是阿比让或圣佩德罗港海关所期望的，而非 CE 式 EMC 符合性声明。集成无线功能的灯具另须取得 ARTCI 无线电批准（见 ledci-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦不實行歐盟 EMC 指令式的獨立電磁兼容法律。若評估 EMC，則通過採用 IEC/CISPR 基礎的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）——CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性，傳導 150 kHz–30 MHz 及輻射發射）——並在貿易部主管的進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃內核驗。引用適用 IEC/CISPR 基礎 NI 標準的 VoC 符合性證書通常是阿比讓或聖佩德羅港海關所期望的，而非 CE 式 EMC 符合性聲明。集成無線功能的燈具另須取得 ARTCI 無線電批准（見 ledci-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: CODINORM national standards (NI) adopting CISPR 15 — radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
Verification of Conformity (VoC) import programme — Ministry of Trade / CODINORM

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (covering safety and EMC for relevant categories). Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. The Chinese CCC EMC report is the domestic proof of compliance.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 报告是国内合规证明。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 報告是國內合規證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Both GB 17743 and the CODINORM NI EMC base derive from CISPR 15, so the technical emission limits are largely harmonized and a product already passing GB 17743 should meet the same limits. The gap is procedural and documentary: (1) Côte d'Ivoire verifies EMC inside the VoC import programme and expects a VoC Certificate of Conformity, not a CCC certificate — the Chinese CCC EMC report is not the accepted clearance document; (2) the conformity-assessment body appointed for the VoC programme will reference the applicable IEC/CISPR-based NI standard, so the test report should be from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory (most Chinese CNAS labs qualify) and traceable to CISPR 15; (3) wireless luminaires need separate ARTCI radio approval. Confirm the exact VoC route and acceptable test-report provenance with the appointed body and the in-country importer before shipment.
gap.zh: GB 17743 与 CODINORM NI EMC 基础均源自 CISPR 15，故技术发射限值基本协调，已通过 GB 17743 的产品应能满足相同限值。差距在于程序和文件：（1）科特迪瓦在 VoC 进口计划内核验 EMC 并期望 VoC 符合性证书，而非 CCC 证书——中国 CCC EMC 报告不是被接受的清关文件；（2）VoC 计划指定的合格评定机构将引用适用的 IEC/CISPR 基础 NI 标准，故检测报告应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室（多数中国 CNAS 实验室符合）并可追溯至 CISPR 15；（3）无线灯具须单独取得 ARTCI 无线电批准。请在装运前与指定机构及在地进口商确认确切 VoC 路径及可接受的检测报告来源。
gap.zht: GB 17743 與 CODINORM NI EMC 基礎均源自 CISPR 15，故技術發射限值基本協調，已通過 GB 17743 的產品應能滿足相同限值。差距在於程序和文件：（1）科特迪瓦在 VoC 進口計劃內核驗 EMC 並期望 VoC 符合性證書，而非 CCC 證書——中國 CCC EMC 報告不是被接受的清關文件；（2）VoC 計劃指定的合格評定機構將引用適用的 IEC/CISPR 基礎 NI 標準，故檢測報告應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室（多數中國 CNAS 實驗室符合）並可追溯至 CISPR 15；（3）無線燈具須單獨取得 ARTCI 無線電批准。請在裝運前與指定機構及在地進口商確認確切 VoC 路徑及可接受的檢測報告來源。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no EU-style standalone EMC law; emissions assessed via CODINORM NI (CISPR 15 base) within the VoC import programme. A VoC Certificate of Conformity, not a CCC certificate, is the expected clearance document.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Côte d'Ivoire has no EU-style standalone EMC law; lighting emissions are assessed against CISPR 15-based CODINORM national standards (NI) inside the import Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), so re-testing burden is limited, but the accepted clearance document is a VoC Certificate of Conformity — not the Chinese CCC report. Use an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory and confirm the VoC route and acceptable test-report provenance with the appointed body and importer. Smart luminaires also require ARTCI radio approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 科特迪瓦无欧盟式独立 EMC 法律；照明发射依据基于 CISPR 15 的 CODINORM 国家标准（NI）在进口符合性验证（VoC）计划内评定。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，重新测试负担有限，但被接受的清关文件是 VoC 符合性证书——而非中国 CCC 报告。请使用 ILAC MRA 认可实验室，并与指定机构及进口商确认 VoC 路径及可接受的检测报告来源。智能灯具还须取得 ARTCI 无线电批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 科特迪瓦無歐盟式獨立 EMC 法律；照明發射依據基於 CISPR 15 的 CODINORM 國家標準（NI）在進口符合性驗證（VoC）計劃內評定。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，重新測試負擔有限，但被接受的清關文件是 VoC 符合性證書——而非中國 CCC 報告。請使用 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室，並與指定機構及進口商確認 VoC 路徑及可接受的檢測報告來源。智能燈具還須取得 ARTCI 無線電批准。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires (ARTCI)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具无线电批准（ARTCI）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具無線電批准（ARTCI）

summary.en: Luminaires with integrated radio functionality (Bluetooth dimming, Wi-Fi/Zigbee smart lighting, RF remote control) require radio-equipment type approval / homologation from ARTCI (Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire) before import and market placement. ARTCI governs use of the radio spectrum and equipment authorisation in Côte d'Ivoire. The applicant (typically the in-country importer or an appointed representative) submits product radio specifications, frequency bands, transmit power, and supporting test evidence (commonly IEC/ETSI-based radio test reports). This is separate from, and additional to, the EMC and safety conformity handled through the CODINORM/VoC route.
summary.zh: 集成无线电功能的灯具（蓝牙调光、Wi-Fi/Zigbee 智能照明、射频遥控）在进口及投放市场前须取得 ARTCI（科特迪瓦电信/信通技术监管局）的无线电设备型式批准/认证。ARTCI 管理科特迪瓦的无线电频谱使用及设备授权。申请人（通常为在地进口商或指定代表）须提交产品无线电规格、频段、发射功率及支持性检测证据（通常为基于 IEC/ETSI 的无线电检测报告）。此项与通过 CODINORM/VoC 路径处理的 EMC 和安全符合性相分离且为额外要求。
summary.zht: 集成無線電功能的燈具（藍牙調光、Wi-Fi/Zigbee 智能照明、射頻遙控）在進口及投放市場前須取得 ARTCI（科特迪瓦電信/信通技術監管局）的無線電設備型式批准/認證。ARTCI 管理科特迪瓦的無線電頻譜使用及設備授權。申請人（通常為在地進口商或指定代表）須提交產品無線電規格、頻段、發射功率及支持性檢測證據（通常為基於 IEC/ETSI 的無線電檢測報告）。此項與通過 CODINORM/VoC 路徑處理的 EMC 和安全符合性相分離且為額外要求。

standards_or_laws: ARTCI radio equipment type approval / homologation — Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire
Côte d'Ivoire telecommunications / spectrum regulation framework

summary.en: China's equivalent for radio-transmitting products is the SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) Type Approval (型号核准), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China, plus CCC where applicable. A smart luminaire with wireless functions sold in China needs SRRC approval covering its frequency bands and transmit power. SRRC approval is domestic only and is not recognised by ARTCI.
summary.zh: 中国对无线电发射产品的对应要求是 SRRC（国家无线电管理）型号核准，对在中国销售的无线电发射设备为强制要求，并在适用时配合 CCC。在中国销售的带无线功能智能灯具须取得涵盖其频段和发射功率的 SRRC 核准。SRRC 核准仅限国内，不被 ARTCI 认可。
summary.zht: 中國對無線電發射產品的對應要求是 SRRC（國家無線電管理）型號核准，對在中國銷售的無線電發射設備為強制要求，並在適用時配合 CCC。在中國銷售的帶無線功能智能燈具須取得涵蓋其頻段和發射功率的 SRRC 核准。SRRC 核准僅限國內，不被 ARTCI 認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Type Approval (型号核准) — State Radio Regulation of China (mandatory for radio transmission equipment)

gap.en: A smart/wireless luminaire that already holds Chinese SRRC approval cannot rely on it for Côte d'Ivoire — ARTCI requires its own type approval / homologation. The two regimes are not mutually recognised. Practical steps for export: (1) confirm the product's radio bands and transmit power are permitted under Côte d'Ivoire spectrum rules; (2) appoint the in-country importer or a local representative to file the ARTCI application; (3) supply IEC/ETSI-based radio test reports and product documentation in French; (4) obtain ARTCI approval before import, in addition to the CODINORM/VoC conformity for the luminaire's electrical safety and EMC. Non-wireless luminaires do not need ARTCI approval.
gap.zh: 已持有中国 SRRC 核准的智能/无线灯具在科特迪瓦不能据此免办——ARTCI 要求其自有型式批准/认证。两制度不互认。出口实务步骤：（1）确认产品无线电频段和发射功率符合科特迪瓦频谱规则；（2）委托在地进口商或当地代表提交 ARTCI 申请；（3）提供基于 IEC/ETSI 的无线电检测报告及法语产品文件；（4）在进口前取得 ARTCI 批准，并配合灯具电气安全和 EMC 的 CODINORM/VoC 符合性。非无线灯具无需 ARTCI 批准。
gap.zht: 已持有中國 SRRC 核准的智能/無線燈具在科特迪瓦不能據此免辦——ARTCI 要求其自有型式批准/認證。兩制度不互認。出口實務步驟：（1）確認產品無線電頻段和發射功率符合科特迪瓦頻譜規則；（2）委托在地進口商或當地代表提交 ARTCI 申請；（3）提供基於 IEC/ETSI 的無線電檢測報告及法語產品文件；（4）在進口前取得 ARTCI 批准，並配合燈具電氣安全和 EMC 的 CODINORM/VoC 符合性。非無線燈具無需 ARTCI 批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (for wireless products) — ARTCI radio equipment type approval / homologation required before import for luminaires with integrated radio functionality. Non-wireless luminaires are out of ARTCI scope.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for wireless products) — SRRC Type Approval required for radio transmission equipment sold in China; not recognised by ARTCI

source.publisher: ARTCI (Autorité de Régulation des Télécommunications/TIC de Côte d'Ivoire)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart or wireless LED luminaires require ARTCI radio equipment type approval / homologation before import into Côte d'Ivoire — a separate obligation from the CODINORM/VoC electrical-safety and EMC conformity. Chinese SRRC approval is domestic only and is not recognised by ARTCI. Appoint the in-country importer or a local representative to file, supply IEC/ETSI-based radio test reports and French documentation, and obtain ARTCI approval before shipment. Non-wireless luminaires are out of ARTCI scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智能或无线 LED 灯具在进口至科特迪瓦前须取得 ARTCI 无线电设备型式批准/认证——这是独立于 CODINORM/VoC 电气安全和 EMC 符合性的义务。中国 SRRC 核准仅限国内，不被 ARTCI 认可。请委托在地进口商或当地代表提交申请、提供基于 IEC/ETSI 的无线电检测报告及法语文件，并在装运前取得 ARTCI 批准。非无线灯具不在 ARTCI 范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智能或無線 LED 燈具在進口至科特迪瓦前須取得 ARTCI 無線電設備型式批准/認證——這是獨立於 CODINORM/VoC 電氣安全和 EMC 符合性的義務。中國 SRRC 核准僅限國內，不被 ARTCI 認可。請委托在地進口商或當地代表提交申請、提供基於 IEC/ETSI 的無線電檢測報告及法語文件，並在裝運前取得 ARTCI 批准。非無線燈具不在 ARTCI 範圍內。
